notes:
Game didn't start at first, I had to change the wine prefix to WinXP
WINEPREFIX=$HOME/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/301830/pfx/ winecfg
Now runs perfectly using keyboard and mouse. Haven't tested game controllers yet.
title: Disney•Pixar Brave: The Video Game

notes: Yeah finally! now with proton 4.2-9 the game runs awesome out of the box.
title: Disney•Pixar Brave: The Video Game
